snippet:

snippet:

name: Add, remove, or hide Windows features | Microsoft Learn
snippet:
Use the Windows Settings app to add or remove features · Right-click on the Start menu and select Settings. · In the Settings app, select System.
Use the Windows Settings app to add or remove features. Open the Optional features pane in the Settings app by selecting the following link.
